next_open_loops.task: Build privacy-safe health profile, symptom, diagnostic-source, medication/supplement, device, provider and intervention schemas using synthetic fixtures.
Create a bounded high-risk claim review queue from the 1,629 historical safety flags, starting with medication changes and device settings; store hashes/pointers only.
Implement Cost customer/member/trade/workshop/vehicle/supplier/order profile schemas and synthetic E2E simulation preserved from v13.
Verify current provider, product, device, regulation and clinical evidence only when a specific decision requires current web research.
Prepare clinician/pharmacist review packet after the user confirms the current medication, supplement and device list.
next_open_loops.blocker: Current user-confirmed regimen and licensed professional review are required.

resolved_this_pass.scope: All five current-turn uploads are exact aliases; zero new source bytes.
156 unique conversations and 27,153 canonical messages across Health, Spooky2 and Psychology.
Prior 157 envelopes preserved; one mixed-lineage duplicate corrected to 156 unique conversations.
Every canonical message in every latest target-project conversation was machine-read and counted.
52 bundled sources processed through text, spreadsheet, PDF and image-specific passes.
32 canonical requirements mapped to implemented, spec-locked or blocked states.
Fail-closed claim triage, evidence/source classes, professional gates and no medical execution.
SQLite idempotent ledger stores claim hashes/classifications only, never raw claim text.
High-risk historical categories remain quarantined and medical-device control remains blocked.

truth_boundary: Every latest target-project message and all accessible bundled source files were machine-processed with privacy-safe summaries. This does not clinically validate all claims, connect health systems, diagnose, treat, operate devices, deploy staging or authorise production.
